caption:
Some friendships are built in fitting rooms, over good taste and honest conversations — and those are the ones that last.

Giorgio from @nousaconcept has been part of our world in more ways than one, and seeing him walk through the door still feels like the season has properly begun. This is what happens when work becomes something more — when the people you meet along the way become the ones you actually want to keep around.

Only at Blink
